title: Vishesh and his Hate for Even Numbers

content.problemStatement:
Vishesh just found an array AAA having NNN positive integers. He hates even numbers and would like to make the array full of only odd numbers. To do so, he is allowed to do the following operation.


Pick a positive integer XXX such that X=2YX = 2^YX=2Y for some non-negative integer YYY. Then, for all elements AiA_iAi​ in AAA, if AiA_iAi​ is divisible by XXX, then we divide AiA_iAi​ by XXX (in other words, we assign Ai←AiXA_i \leftarrow \frac{A_i}{X}Ai​←XAi​​).
Let's define f(B)f(B)f(B) as the minimum operations required to make an array BBB have only odd numbers using the operation described above. Find the sum of f(a)f(a)f(a) over all subarrays aaa of AAA.

**Note:** A subarray of AAA is acquired by removing some (possibly none) elements from the beginning and some (possible none) elements from the end of AAA.


Input Format

The first line of each input contains TTT - the number of test cases. The test cases then follow.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN - the size of AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ - the array AAA.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a single line the answer to the problem.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases is not more than 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111:

[1][1][1] requires 000 operations.
[1,2][1, 2][1,2] requires 111 operation.
[1,2,4][1, 2, 4][1,2,4] requires 222 operations.
[2][2][2] requires 111 operation.
[2,4][2, 4][2,4] requires 222 operations.
[4][4][4] requires 111 operation.



Therefore, sum of f(a)f(a)f(a) over all subarrays aaa of AAA is 777.

Test case 222:

[1][1][1] requires 000 operations.
[1,2][1, 2][1,2] requires 111 operation.
[1,2,1][1, 2, 1][1,2,1] requires 111 operation.
[2][2][2] requires 111 operation.
[2,1][2, 1][2,1] requires 111 operation.
[1][1][1] requires 000 operations.



Therefore, sum of f(a)f(a)f(a) over all subarrays aaa of AAA is 444.
